text.title: ES Agentic Pipeline Procedure
text.summary: 5-stage agentic pipeline. Each stage carries a fixed prompt template + acceptance criteria.

step.name: aggregate-design
step.action: Sonnet drafts: aggregate name, list of past-tense events, command method signatures, invariants. Reviewer rejects CRUD-shaped events at this stage (not after codegen).
step.decision-gate: If any event name is non-past-tense, STOP and re-prompt.

step.name: event-class-codegen
step.action: Sonnet generates event classes (frozen records with event_id + occurred_at + aggregate identity). Aggregate command + apply handlers. Repository scaffold using the real library API.

step.name: projection-codegen
step.action: Sonnet generates projection handlers writing to read store. Reviewer rejects any handler with non-storage side effects.

step.name: tests-codegen
step.action: Haiku generates xUnit-style tests: command → expected events, replay → expected state, optimistic-concurrency clash. Test names assert event emission, not getter equality.

step.name: antipattern-review
step.action: Sonnet (or human) runs rules from `01-core-rules.xml` against every file. Output: rejection list with rule_id + offending line. PR blocked until all rules pass.
step.decision-gate: If any rule fails, FAIL pipeline; do not advance to merge.
